title: User Authentication Failure
description: Users unable to login. JWT token validation throwing 500 errors. Affects all login endpoints. ~3200 users locked out.

title: Checkout Payment Timeout
description: Payment processing hanging indefinitely. Stripe webhook not responding. Transactions failing silently. Revenue loss ~$12k/hr.

title: Product Search Returning Empty Results
description: Search bar returning zero results for all queries. Elasticsearch index appears stale. Affects 100% of search traffic.

title: Email Notifications Not Delivered
description: Password reset and order confirmation emails not sending. SES queue depth growing. Bounce rate spiked to 91%.

title: Dashboard Charts Blank for Pro Users
description: Analytics dashboard showing empty charts for all Pro tier accounts. Console error: TypeError on undefined data. Free tier unaffected.
